ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_MZK_TREE_BRANCH.d: At the start of each combat, your first damage dealt applies [gold]3[/gold] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DARK_BLUE_TREE.de: Whenever you deal damage, apply [gold]2[/gold] additional [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DETERMINATION.des: Upon pickup, add [gold]{Cards}[/gold] random Curses to your deck. At the start of each combat, add a [blue]Slimed[/blue] to your hand. Opens the path to Act 4.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OBSERVATION.title: Observation
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OBSERVATION.descr: At the start of each turn, gain [gold]{Block}[/gold] Block.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_TIDEWATCHER_LANTE: Upon pickup, remove all Curses from your deck.
Its wick is soaked in tidewater, yet still burns.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DEEP_BLUE_HEART.d: Upon pickup, choose up to [gold]{Cards}[/gold] cards in your deck to remove. At the start of each combat, gain [gold]{StrengthPower}[/gold] Strength and [gold]{DexterityPower}[/gold] Dexterity.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DEEP_BLUE_HEART.f: When it beats, it almost feels as if the entire sea has accepted you.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.title: Swan Song
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.descrip: Upon pickup, choose [gold]{Cards}[/gold] cards in your deck to enchant with Revelation.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.flavor: The final voice is not an ending, but an echo before returning home.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.title: Ocean's Pulse
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.descr: Whenever you play a Colorless or Token card, gain [gold]{Block}[/gold] Block.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.flavo: Each beat answers a tide that has not yet reached the shore.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.title: Key
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.description:
When choosing the next room, you may ignore the current path [blue]{Rooms}[/blue] times. [red]This effect is lost in multiplayer.[/red]
After combat, there is a chance to gain [gold]1[/gold] Key.
[blue]Keys may have other uses...[/blue]
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.flavor: A precious and hard-won resource. Spend one key, and any lock you wish to open can be opened.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DRIFTING_COFFER.d: Upon pickup, if you have at least [gold]1[/gold] Key, lose [gold]1[/gold] Key and gain [gold]{Cards}[/gold] card rewards. Otherwise, gain [gold]{Gold}[/gold] Gold.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DRIFTING_COFFER.f: The lock has been worn smooth by tides that never reached the shore.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_BUOYANT_VESICLE.d: At the start of each combat, [gold]Float[/gold] [gold]{Float}[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_BUOYANT_VESICLE.f: Not 998, only 688. Tentacle Care Ointment: healthier tentacles, happier you.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_JUVENILE_CRADLE.d: Whenever a [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] is added during combat, Upgrade it.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_JUVENILE_CRADLE.f: The young are born knowing which way the tide returns.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SHRINKING_SPINE.f: The wound does not merely hurt. It teaches the body to recede.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_PACMAN_COLLECTORS: Whenever [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] bursts, apply [gold]{ShrinkPower}[/gold] [blue]Shrink[/blue] to the target.
Colorful electronic dots enter your eyes, then swim back to the We Many like some tiny instinct.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_REWARD_DRIFTING_COFFER_: Open the Drifting Coffer with a key.
Smash the Drifting Coffer with a hammer.
